title: Headline intent structured-surface fixture
description: A title that promises a structured do-not surface and should become a title-level structured-surface cue instead of a strict anchor.

expected.section_intent_cue_text: Mistakes to Avoid on Your Resume

manifest.title: Mistakes to Avoid on Your Resume

block_map.text: Resume mistakes can quietly weaken your chances before a hiring manager reads very far. Small choices in wording, formatting, and organization can change whether the document feels current and credible.

Outdated contact details.
Buried achievements.
Visible grammar or formatting mistakes.

manifest.plain_text:
Mistakes to Avoid on Your Resume

Resume mistakes can quietly weaken your chances before a hiring manager reads very far. Small choices in wording, formatting, and organization can change whether the document feels current and credible.

Outdated contact details.
Buried achievements.
Visible grammar or formatting mistakes.
